Protocol.Name: Empower 2026 - AI - PM in Tables
Protocol.Description: Protocol to demonstrate Pattern matching on tables

Param.Name: TimeOfProcessing
Param.Description: The timestamp we give to each point

Param.Name: ProtocolActions
Param.Description: Press this to push in historical trend data

Param.Name: numberOfHistoryPointsToReadAtStartup
Param.Description: Number of history points to read at startup
